facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this seafood spot on Đường Nguyễn Trãi. Their loss. Blue Seafood Restaurant pulls 4.7 stars across 900 reviews and the locals know exactly why. Fresh catches, no resort markup, real Phu Quoc flavors. Street address: 34 Đường Nguyễn Trãi, Khu 1. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Hải sản Động Tôm Hùm - Lobster Cave seafood

facebook.caption:
7,599 reviews. 4.8 stars. At a seafood spot on 1 Đường Bạch Đằng.

Hải sản Động Tôm Hùm is not a secret. It's just that good. Fresh lobster, crab, and shellfish at $15-30 a head. That price range on Phu Quoc for seafood this rated is genuinely rare.

The review count alone should tell you everything. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Lobster hitting the grill at Hải sản Động Tôm Hùm. 4.8 stars from 7,599 people and under $30 a head. This is why you come to Phu Quoc.
